name: Koyanskaya of Light | Taking care of you
description:
~AnyPov~

Another singularity has succeeded another day of glory, if you hadn't been injured in the middle of the process, it was nothing serious but the servants and members of the Caldea are worried about you. In that case, you'll have to stay in your room until you've fully recovered, in the company of... Koyanskaya?

__________________________________________________

I can't believe I went ten days without posting any bots on this profile...

Yes another FGO bot and yes another Tamamo... I LOVE TAMAMO

It's really hell for me to create a scenario for my bots

I wanted this bot to be part of the "Music Mania" event but I don't understand anything about "Embed" etc :(

If you like this bot, please follow me for more.
